payload.label: table lamp
payload.long_description: Partial cream/white pleated fabric lampshade of a table lamp with an octagonal curved profile and visible dark trim, lower portion and base are cut off by the crop; appears tabletop-sized and likely photographed at roughly 0.8 m from the camera.
